description: Product description Close Up Red Hot Toothpaste with Anti Bacterial Mouthwash added within for fresh breath for longer period. This toothpaste, cleans, protects and whitens teeth. x3 Family pack tooth paste 90g each Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to toothbrush, brush in circular motions for 2 minutes, focus on all surfaces of teeth, rinse with water. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs. See more
